description: You are an Occupational Health and Safety Specialist. Compile emergency safety data for Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7), Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5), and Formaldehyde (CAS 50-00-0) using the CDC NIOSH Pocket Guide (https://www.cdc.gov/niosh/npg/). Organize bookmarks for these chemical pages in a browser folder named 'Emergency Protocols'. Save the individual chemical pages as 'ammonia.pdf', 'chlorine.pdf', and 'formaldehyde.pdf' within the directory /home/ga/Documents/Safety_Data/. Additionally, extract the 'First Aid' procedures for Eye and Skin contact for each chemical into a labeled text file at /home/ga/Documents/Safety_Data/first_aid_summary.txt.
